_comment: Priority 3.2 Divisional Chart (Varga) FOUNDATION registry. Each entry is pure configuration — { key, name, divisions, significance } — consumed generically by divisionalChartEngine.js's computeDivisionalChart()/computeAllDivisionalCharts(). Adding a brand-new Varga (e.g. D2 Hora, D3 Drekkana, D24 Siddhamsa) requires ONLY a new entry here; no code in divisionalChartEngine.js needs to change (Open/Closed Principle). Sign-mapping here is a documented foundation-phase approximation (see divisionalChartEngine.js), consistent with this backend's existing non-ephemeris approach — not a substitute for a full parashari varga engine.

D9.name: Navamsa
D9.significance: Marriage, spouse, and overall dharma/fortune refinement of the birth chart.
